ucs.title: [LLM] Famous Chollima 'Contagious Interview' chain — npm/node spawning curl|python C2 followed by browser credential & crypto-wallet theft
ucs.description: Hunts the trademark DPRK 'Contagious Interview' infection chain (BeaverTail JS stealer → InvisibleFerret Python backdoor) where a developer is tricked into running a malicious npm package or 'coding test'. Detects node/npm/yarn spawning curl/wget/python/powershell that reaches out to attacker infrastructure, followed within 30 minutes by access to Chromium 'Login Data', Cookies, password-manager files, or known crypto-wallet directories on the same host — the exact tradecraft published by Unit42, Mandiant (UNC5267) and CrowdStrike on FAMOUS CHOLLIMA / Sapphire Sleet (Microsoft) / TA444.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) AS firstTime max(_time) AS lastTime values(Processes.process) AS cmd values(Processes.parent_process) AS parent_cmd values(Processes.process_name) AS child from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("node.exe","npm.exe","npm.cmd","yarn.exe","pnpm.exe","npx.cmd","bash.exe","sh.exe","wsl.exe")) AND (Processes.process_name IN ("curl.exe","wget.exe","python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")) AND (Processes.process="*http*" OR Processes.process="*-c *" OR Processes.process="*base64*" OR Processes.process="*urllib*" OR Processes.process="*urlretrieve*" OR Processes.process="*DownloadString*" OR Processes.process="*-OutFile*") AND Processes.user!="*$" by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest AS host | join type=inner host [ | tstats summariesonly=true count values(Filesystem.file_path) AS sensitive_artifacts from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path="*\\Login Data*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Cookies*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Local State*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*MetaMask*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*Exodus*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Solana\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Wallets\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*1Password*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Bitwarden\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\.ssh\\id_*") AND Filesystem.action="read" by Filesystem.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | rename dest AS host ] | where lastTime - firstTime <= 1800 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let WindowMinutes = 30m;
let DevParents = dynamic(["node.exe","npm.exe","npm.cmd","yarn.exe","pnpm.exe","npx.cmd","bash.exe","sh.exe","wsl.exe"]);
let C2Children = dynamic(["curl.exe","wget.exe","python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"]);
let StealerArtifacts = dynamic([@"\Login Data",@"\Cookies",@"\Local State",@"MetaMask",@"Exodus",@"\Solana\",@"\Wallets\",@"1Password",@"\Bitwarden\",@"\.ssh\id_"]);
let SuspectExec = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (DevParents)
    | where FileName in~ (C2Children)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("http://","https://","-c ","base64","urllib","urlretrieve","DownloadString","-OutFile","-enc","IEX","Invoke-Expression")
    | project ExecTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              ChildImage = FolderPath, ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine, ReportId;
let StealerHits = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where FolderPath has_any (StealerArtifacts) or FileName has_any (StealerArtifacts)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe")    // legitimate browser self-access
    | project FileTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, AccessedPath = strcat(FolderPath, FileName), AccessingProcess = InitiatingProcessFileName;
SuspectExec
| join kind=inner StealerHits on DeviceId
| where FileTime between (ExecTime .. ExecTime + WindowMinutes)
| extend DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', FileTime, ExecTime)
| project ExecTime, FileTime, DelaySec, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentCmd, ChildImage, ChildCmd, AccessingProcess, AccessedPath
| order by ExecTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let WindowMinutes = 30m;
let DevParents = dynamic(["node.exe","npm.exe","npm.cmd","yarn.exe","pnpm.exe","npx.cmd","bash.exe","sh.exe","wsl.exe"]);
let C2Children = dynamic(["curl.exe","wget.exe","python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"]);
let StealerArtifacts = dynamic([@"\Login Data",@"\Cookies",@"\Local State",@"MetaMask",@"Exodus",@"\Solana\",@"\Wallets\",@"1Password",@"\Bitwarden\",@"\.ssh\id_"]);
let SuspectExec = ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | extend ParentBin = tostring(split(ParentProcessName, '\\')[-1]),
             ChildBin  = tostring(split(TargetProcessName, '\\')[-1])
    | where ParentBin in~ (DevParents) and ChildBin in~ (C2Children)
    | where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
    | where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any ("http://","https://","-c ","base64","urllib","urlretrieve","DownloadString","-OutFile","-enc","IEX","Invoke-Expression")
    | project ExecTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
              ParentCmd = ParentProcessCommandLine,
              ChildCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine;
let StealerHits = ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where TargetFilePath has_any (StealerArtifacts) or TargetFileName has_any (StealerArtifacts)
    | extend ActingBin = tostring(split(ActingProcessName, '\\')[-1])
    | where ActingBin !in~ ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe")
    | project FileTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, AccessedPath = TargetFilePath, AccessingProcess = ActingProcessName;
SuspectExec
| join kind=inner StealerHits on DvcHostname
| where FileTime between (ExecTime .. ExecTime + WindowMinutes)
| extend DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', FileTime, ExecTime)
| project ExecTime, FileTime, DelaySec, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          ParentCmd, ChildCmd, AccessingProcess, AccessedPath
| order by ExecTime desc
ucs.rationale: Famous Chollima (CrowdStrike) — also tracked as Sapphire Sleet (Microsoft), UNC5267 (Mandiant), TA444 — operate the 'Contagious Interview' / DEV#POPPER campaign in which DPRK operatives pose as recruiters, hand a target a fake coding test or malicious npm package, and watch for execution. The dropper is BeaverTail (a JavaScript stealer that runs under Node) and its second stage InvisibleFerret is

_field_issues.message: `StealerHits` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`ExecTime` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`ParentCmd` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`ChildImage` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`ChildCmd` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `TargetFilePath` is not a column of ImProcessCreate; it does exist on ImFileEvent.
`StealerHits` is not a canonical column of ImProcessCreate.
`ExecTime` is not a canonical column of ImProcessCreate. Did you mean `EventEndTime`?
`ParentCmd` is not a canonical column of ImProcessCreate.
`ChildCmd` is not a canonical column of ImProcessCreate.

ucs.title: [LLM] Famous Chollima DPRK 'IT-worker' laptop-farm tradecraft — silent unattended-access RMM provisioning on corporate dev/engineering endpoints
ucs.description: Hunts the laptop-farm pattern reported by FBI/DOJ/Mandiant/CrowdStrike: a DPRK operative hired under a false identity receives a corporate laptop at a US/EU facilitator address and immediately configures unattended remote-control software (AnyDesk, ChromeRemoteDesktopHost, RustDesk, TeamViewer) so handlers in DPRK/PRC can drive the workstation. Detects the silent install / set-password / start-with-windows / service-install command lines emitted during that provisioning step on a corporate-managed device, scoped to non-IT user accounts.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) AS firstTime max(_time) AS lastTime values(Processes.process) AS cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) AS parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("AnyDesk.exe","ChromeRemoteDesktopHost.exe","remoting_host.exe","RustDesk.exe","rustdesk.exe","TeamViewer_Service.exe","TeamViewer.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe") OR Processes.parent_process_name IN ("AnyDesk.exe","ChromeRemoteDesktopHost.exe","remoting_host.exe","RustDesk.exe","TeamViewer_Service.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe")) AND (Processes.process="*--set-password*" OR Processes.process="*SetPassword*" OR Processes.process="*--silent*" OR Processes.process="*--install*" OR Processes.process="*--start-with-win*" OR Processes.process="*--service*" OR Processes.process="*/silent*" OR Processes.process="*--unattended*" OR Processes.process="*-pw *" OR Processes.process="*--password *" OR Processes.process="*--start*--service*") AND Processes.user!="*$" AND Processes.user!="SYSTEM" by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 30d;
let RmmTools = dynamic(["AnyDesk.exe","ChromeRemoteDesktopHost.exe","remoting_host.exe","RustDesk.exe","rustdesk.exe","TeamViewer_Service.exe","TeamViewer.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe","UltraVNC.exe","winvnc.exe"]);
let UnattendedFlags = dynamic(["--set-password","SetPassword","--silent","--install","--start-with-win","--service","/silent","--unattended","-pw ","--password ","--start --service","--register-service"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where (FileName in~ (RmmTools)) or (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (RmmTools))
| where AccountName !endswith "$" and AccountName !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (UnattendedFlags) or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (UnattendedFlags)
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceInfo
    | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OSPlatform, JoinType, IsAzureADJoined, PublicIP, MachineGroup) by DeviceId
  ) on DeviceId
| join kind=leftouter (
    IdentityInfo
    | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, JobTitle, Department, City, Country, IsAccountEnabled) by AccountUpn
  ) on $left.AccountUpn == $right.AccountUpn
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountUpn, JobTitle, Department, Country,
          RmmTool = FileName, RmmCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentTool = InitiatingProcessFileName, ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          PublicIP, JoinType, MachineGroup
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 30d;
let RmmTools = dynamic(["AnyDesk.exe","ChromeRemoteDesktopHost.exe","remoting_host.exe","RustDesk.exe","rustdesk.exe","TeamViewer_Service.exe","TeamViewer.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe","UltraVNC.exe","winvnc.exe"]);
let UnattendedFlags = dynamic(["--set-password","SetPassword","--silent","--install","--start-with-win","--service","/silent","--unattended","-pw ","--password ","--start --service","--register-service"]);
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| extend ChildBin  = tostring(split(TargetProcessName, '\\')[-1]),
         ParentBin = tostring(split(ParentProcessName, '\\')[-1])
| where ChildBin in~ (RmmTools) or ParentBin in~ (RmmTools)
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$" and ActorUsername !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
| where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (UnattendedFlags) or ParentProcessCommandLine has_any (UnattendedFlags)
| join kind=leftouter (
    IdentityInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, JobTitle, Department, Country, IsAccountEnabled) by AccountUpn
  ) on $left.ActorUsername == $right.AccountUpn
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername, JobTitle, Department, Country,
          RmmTool = ChildBin, RmmCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine,
          ParentTool = ParentBin, ParentCmd = ParentProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Famous Chollima DPRK IT-Worker — Silent Unattended RMM Provisioning
id: 4b8d2e2a-9d2f-4a9b-9e5a-6d6f1b4c3a21
status: experimental
description: Detects unattended-access provisioning of remote-control software (AnyDesk, Chrome Remote Desktop, RustDesk, TeamViewer, ScreenConnect) on corporate endpoints — the laptop-farm tradecraft used by DPRK 'Famous Chollima' / Sapphire Sleet IT-worker operatives to grant handlers persistent control of company-issued devices.
references:
    - https://www.crowdstrike.com/adversaries/famous-chollima/
    - https://www.justice.gov/usao-edva/pr/north-korean-it-worker-laptop-farm
    - https://cloud.google.com/blog/topics/threat-intelligence/mitigating-dprk-it-worker-threat
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2025/05/08
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1219
    - attack.t1133
    - attack.t1078
    - dprk.famous_chollima
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_image:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\AnyDesk.exe'
            - '\ChromeRemoteDesktopHost.exe'
            - '\remoting_host.exe'
            - '\RustDesk.exe'
            - '\rustdesk.exe'
            - '\TeamViewer_Service.exe'
            - '\TeamViewer.exe'
            - '\ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe'
            - '\UltraVNC.exe'
            - '\winvnc.exe'
    selection_flags:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - '--set-password'
            - 'SetPassword'
            - '--silent'
            - '--install'
            - '--start-with-win'
            - '--service'
            - '/silent'
            - '--unattended'
            - '-pw '
            - '--password '
            - '--register-service'
    filter_machine:
        User|endswith: '$'
    filter_system:
        User|contains:
            - 'SYSTEM'
            - 'LOCAL SERVICE'
            - 'NETWORK SERVICE'
    condition: selection_image and selection_flags and not filter_machine and not filter_system
falsepositives:
    - Sanctioned IT/helpdesk RMM rollouts — exclude IT user accounts and packaging hosts.
    - Vendor-driven endpoint imaging — bake legitimate config commands into a deny-list.
level: high
ucs.rationale: FBI/DOJ indictments and Mandiant's UNC5267 reporting on the DPRK 'IT-worker' / laptop-farm scheme repeatedly identify the same on-host tell: a freshly-issued corporate device has its RMM stack silently configured for unattended access in the first hours/days the operative possesses it (AnyDesk `--set-password` + `--start-with-win`, ChromeRemoteDesktopHost service install, RustDesk silent service r
